final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [7:0] in_data,
    output reg [7:0] out_data
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out_data <= 8'b0;
        end else begin
            out_data <= in_data;  // Example functionality for testing
        end
    end
endmodule
